nodes.name: Prionops
nodes.summary: Prionops（Prionops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如White-crested helmetshrike、Grey-crested helmetshrike、Yellow-crested helmetshrike等8种鸟类。

nodes.name: Red-billed helmetshrike
nodes.summary: The red-billed helmetshrike or chestnut-bellied helmetshrike (Prionops caniceps) is a species of bird in the Vanga family, Vangidae, formerly usually included in the Malaconotidae. It is native to the Guinean Forests of West Africa. In Central Africa it is replaced by the rufous-bellied helmet-shrike (P. rufiventris) ; both are sometimes regarded as two subspecies of the "chestnut-bellied helmetshrike". Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist shrubland. References African Bird Club (2008) ABC African Checklist: Passerines Archived 2008-05-09 at the Wayback Machine Accessed 20/08/08.
